name: White Chili#1
recipeIngredient: 4 fresh jalapeno peppers, seeded and chopped
1.5 chicken breasts, skinned, boned, and cut into pieces
Optional: cayenne pepper, white pepper, pickled jalapenos with a little juice, grated Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 5-quart pan.
2. Saute scallions, yellow pepper, garlic, fresh jalapeno peppers, ginger, salt, sage, and cumin until fragrant.
3. Add chicken and cook until just done. Do not overcook. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside.
4. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in the same pan.
5. When bubbling, add flour and whisk briskly while adding cream. Continue stirring until smooth and thick.
6. Add chicken broth and stir until blended. Stir in corn, beans, and chicken mixture.
7. Simmer for 30 minutes. If desired, add cayenne pepper, white pepper, and pickled jalapenos with a little juice.
8. Serve chili hot, topped with grated cheese and accompanied by cornbread.
